pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Word Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: 1-stage 9-layer H-Net learns byte-level dynamic chunking, tuning outer-layer depth and ratio loss to recover whitespace-aligned segments without a tokenizer.
techniques: Dynamic chunking router tuned via ratio loss and outer-layer depth
Matched byte260 vs sp1024 ablations for chunk behavior
Multi-GPU padded-chunk DDP training for compressed sequences
